class.name: InputHapticEffectCustom
class.brief_description: A haptic effect that represents a custom force.
class.description: A haptic effect that represents a custom force (with type of [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_CUSTOM]). [b]Note:[/b] See [url=https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/desktop/ee416371(v=vs.85)]DirectInput documentation[/url] and [url=https://wiki.libsdl.org/SDL3/SDL_HapticCustom]SDL documentation[/url] for more information.

members.member: Axes to use, minimum of one.
Sample data, should contain [member channels]*[member samples] items.
Period of the effect, in seconds.
